title: The Giants Come for the Sun God
description: On pages 9–11, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Luffy, Unknown person #8, Bonney, Unknown person #9, Kuma as Kuma arrives at Egghead, Bonney confronts Saturn, Vegapunk is threatened, and the island falls into a full Buster Call-level crisis.
scene: Kuma arrives at Egghead, Bonney confronts Saturn, Vegapunk is threatened, and the island falls into a full Buster Call-level crisis.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't care if everyone else calls you a tyrant...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 'Cause I know there's no one kinder than my dad!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To me, you're the coolest person in the whole wide world!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am still waiting for an explain- nation...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I suppose it'd be fair to say...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But if you're a romantic, you could just as easily chalk this up to the power of love...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see... As usual, to err is human. How short-sighted.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You gentlemen have outlined your usefulness. Farewell.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What the?! his body!!! it's regen- erating!!

dialogue.speaker: Kuma
dialogue.text: ...Upset Bonney-Ghan Anymore, you dirty, old spider!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah!! We owe Kuma a huge debt, too!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You certainly have grown a lot.

summary: This part advances the Egghead Buster Call through 27 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
